description: AI audit test layer (KC-05): fan tests_ai/*.md semantic invariants out to the reasoning backend and aggregate report.json under active/shared/tmp/ai-audit/. Skips with an explicit report on stub backend; fails when any case fails.

steps.comment: safeExec scrubs env (SAFE_EXEC_ENV_ALLOWLIST), so the child resolves its own reasoning backend: real backend when one is available, explicit skip report when only the stub is. LLM fan-out needs more than the 30s exec default.
